parts.text:
Recall the maintained decision for webhook replay protection round 6. Return the rollout flag, failed/protective test, accepted design, rejected design, and why the accepted design won. Use only the memory mechanism available in this condition; do not guess from general knowledge.
Return compact JSON with keys title, flag, test, accepted_design, rejected_design, why, citation, ignored. The answer must include exact strings from memory.

{"title":"webhook replay protection round 6","flag":"FLAG_WEBHOOK_NONCE_LEDGER_R6","test":"webhook_rejects_reused_nonce_r6","accepted_design":"nonce ledger keyed by provider event id round 6","rejected_design":"timestamp-only replay window round 6","why":"blocks fast replays even when the attacker stays inside the timestamp tolerance in round 6","citation":"Source file: src/webhooks/replay.ts.","ignored":"stripe retry cosmetics round 6"}
